name: Buffer
description: Social media management tool for scheduling posts and analyzing performance across platforms.

name: Hootsuite
description: Enterprise social media management platform for scheduling, monitoring, and reporting across networks.

name: Later
description: Visual social media scheduling tool focused on Instagram, TikTok, and Pinterest content planning.

name: Sprout Social
description: All-in-one social media management platform with publishing, analytics, and engagement tools.

name: Brandwatch
description: Social listening and consumer intelligence platform for tracking brand mentions and trends.

name: Mention
description: Media monitoring tool that tracks brand mentions across social media, news, and the web.

name: Agorapulse
description: Social media management tool with inbox, publishing, reporting, and team collaboration features.

name: SocialBee
description: Social media management tool with content categorization and evergreen recycling capabilities.

name: Discord
description: Voice, video, and text communication platform for building communities around shared interests.

name: Circle
description: Modern community platform for creators and brands to host discussions, courses, and events.

name: Mighty Networks
description: Community platform combining courses, memberships, and events under your own brand.

name: Tribe (Bettermode)
description: Customizable community platform for brands to build engagement portals and knowledge bases.

name: Discourse
description: Open-source forum software for building civilized community discussions with modern features.

name: Reddit
description: Social news and discussion platform organized into topic-based communities called subreddits.

name: Slack
description: Team communication platform with channels, messaging, and app integrations for workplaces.

name: Telegram
description: Cloud-based messaging app with groups, channels, and bots for personal and community use.

name: Twitter/X API
description: API for accessing Twitter/X data including tweets, users, and engagement programmatically.

name: Instagram Graph API
description: API for managing Instagram business accounts, publishing content, and accessing insights.

name: Facebook Graph API
description: Primary API for reading and writing data to the Facebook social graph programmatically.

name: Stream
description: API for building scalable activity feeds and chat messaging into applications.

name: Sendbird
description: Chat and messaging API for embedding in-app communication into mobile and web applications.

name: Linktree
description: Link-in-bio tool that creates a landing page with multiple links for social media profiles.

name: Beacons
description: All-in-one creator platform with link-in-bio, media kit, email marketing, and online store.

name: Stan Store
description: Link-in-bio storefront for creators to sell digital products, bookings, and courses.

name: Gumroad
description: Platform for creators to sell digital products, memberships, and physical goods directly to fans.

name: Patreon
description: Membership platform where creators earn recurring revenue from fans through exclusive content.

name: Substack
description: Publishing platform for independent writers to create paid newsletters and build audiences.

name: CreatorIQ
description: Enterprise influencer marketing platform for discovering, managing, and measuring creator campaigns.

name: Upfluence
description: Influencer marketing platform for finding influencers and managing brand ambassador programs.

name: AspireIQ
description: Community-driven influencer marketing platform connecting brands with content creators at scale.

name: Sprinklr
description: Unified customer experience management platform with social media and marketing capabilities.

name: Khoros
description: Digital customer engagement platform combining social media management with community forums.

name: Loomly
description: Brand management platform for social media content creation, scheduling, and collaboration.

name: Tailwind
description: Social media scheduling tool specialized for Pinterest and Instagram with smart scheduling.

name: CoSchedule
description: Marketing calendar and social media organizer for planning content across teams and platforms.

name: Publer
description: Social media scheduling tool with bulk upload, auto-scheduling, and link-in-bio features.

name: Disqus
description: Comment system plugin that adds discussions, reactions, and moderation to any website.

name: Commento
description: Privacy-focused commenting platform that embeds lightweight discussions on any website.

name: Giscus
description: Open-source comment system powered by GitHub Discussions for static sites and blogs.

name: Auth0 Social Login
description: Social login integration supporting Google, Facebook, GitHub, and dozens of identity providers.

name: Clerk
description: Authentication platform with social login, user management, and embeddable UI components.

name: ShareThis
description: Social sharing buttons and plugins that let visitors share website content across networks.

name: AddThis
description: Free social sharing tools and plugins for websites to increase content distribution.

name: Trustpilot
description: Online review platform where consumers share feedback and businesses manage their reputation.

name: G2
description: Software review platform where businesses and users compare and rate SaaS products.

name: Yotpo
description: E-commerce marketing platform for reviews, loyalty programs, and user-generated content.

name: Bazaarvoice
description: User-generated content platform for collecting and displaying ratings, reviews, and Q&A.

name: Mastodon
description: Open-source decentralized social network using the ActivityPub protocol for federated microblogging.

name: Bluesky
description: Decentralized social media platform built on the AT Protocol for open microblogging.

name: Forem
description: Open-source community platform powering DEV.to for building developer-focused social networks.

name: Orbit
description: Community growth platform for tracking member engagement across dev tools and social channels.

name: Common Room
description: Community intelligence platform that unifies signals from social, chat, and product channels.

name: Hivebrite
description: Community management platform for alumni networks, associations, and professional communities.

name: Vanilla Forums
description: Cloud-based community forum platform for brands to build customer support and engagement hubs.

name: phpBB
description: Free open-source bulletin board software for building discussion forums on your own server.

name: vBulletin
description: Commercial forum software with community features, content management, and moderation tools.

name: Sprinkle Data
description: Social media analytics platform for competitive benchmarking and performance reporting.

name: Iconosquare
description: Social media analytics and management tool for Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, and LinkedIn.

name: Emplifi
description: Social media marketing platform combining analytics, publishing, and social commerce tools.

name: Canva
description: Design platform with social media templates, scheduling, and content creation for marketers.

name: Liker
description: Shoppable link-in-bio tool that turns social media feeds into clickable storefronts.

name: Nolt
description: User feedback board for collecting, organizing, and prioritizing feature requests publicly.

name: Canny
description: Feature request management tool that lets users vote on ideas and track product roadmaps.

name: UserVoice
description: Product feedback management platform for collecting and prioritizing user feature requests.

name: Matrix (Element)
description: Open-source decentralized communication protocol with Element as its flagship client app.

name: Rocket.Chat
description: Open-source team communication platform with chat, video, and omnichannel messaging features.

name: Mattermost
description: Open-source, self-hosted messaging platform for secure team collaboration and DevOps workflows.

name: Chatwoot

name: Crisp
description: Business messaging platform combining live chat, chatbot, and shared inbox for customer support.

name: Intercom
description: Customer messaging platform with live chat, bots, and help center for business communication.

name: Zendesk Community
description: Community forum feature within Zendesk for building customer self-service and peer support.

name: Ghost
description: Open-source publishing platform for professional bloggers with memberships and newsletters.

name: Hashnode
description: Blogging platform for developers with custom domains and a built-in developer community.

name: Medium
description: Online publishing platform for writers and thinkers with built-in audience distribution.

name: Twitch
description: Live streaming platform primarily for gaming with community features and monetization tools.
